description:
Complex system of ablative blast baffles that can absorb enormous damage. Grants +1 AC and 20 extra maximum hit points.

+1 AC, +20 maximum hit points

Reinforced armor plating granting +2 AC bonus. Can decrease Speed below 0, applying as a penalty to all Pilot tests.

+2 AC, -1 Speed

Hardened bulkheads, reinforced hatches, and automated kill corridors. Prevents entry without shipyard-grade tools or hull-melting weapons.

Makes enemy boarding more difficult

High-powered microwave emitter that fries the guidance package of one incoming missile or torpedo. Negates one otherwise-successful hit per engagement. Can be activated after damage is rolled.

Negate one successful hit

Short-lived drones producing enormous energy signatures. Grant +2 AC until the ship's next turn. Cheaply constructed; limited only by storage space.

+2 AC for one round when fired, Ammo 5

A combination of thermal decoys, chaff launchers, and active radar spoofing, giving any hit a 1 in 6 chance of being negated entirely.

1 in 6 chance of any given attack missing

Complex glazing process that hardens the ship's armor surface. Decreases the armor-piercing quality of any hit by 5.

AP quality of attacking weapons reduced by 5

Brake cannons and neutralizing electromagnetic projectors. Useless in ship-to-ship combat but can deflect meteor impacts, penetrator rods, and prevent nuclear fission over a hemisphere.

Anti-impact and anti-nuke surface defenses

Small lasers that detonate or melt incoming munitions, improving defenses against torpedoes and other ammunition-based weapons.

+2 AC versus weapons that use ammo
